name: Green Tomato Chutney
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Tart green apples; peeled, cored and diced
6 Red chili peppers, dried; 1-inch long each (then broken)
1/2 lb Shallots; peeled or small pickling onions, halved if large (1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients in a wide 4-quart saucepan.
2. Bring to boil quickly and adjust heat.
3. Boil about 30 minutes, or until as thick as jam.
4. Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.
5. Spoon into hot, sterilized half-pint jars; seal.
6. Let stand at least a month.
If you want a less spicy product, remove some of the seeds in the dried chiles.
